title: IC 36-1-2-2 - "Bonds"
text:
IC 36-1-2-2
"Bonds"
Sec. 2. "Bonds" means any evidences of indebtedness, whether payable from property
taxes, revenues, or any other source, but does not include notes or warrants representing
temporary loans that are payable out of taxes levied and in the course of collection.
[Pre-Local Government Recodification Citations: 6-1.1-20-1 part; 19-8-5-1 part.]
As added by Acts 1980, P.L.211, SEC.1.
